notes:
Game loads fine and goes to character creation and from there to lobby but when you start the first mission the game does not go further than that. It just keeps loading.
Disable Esync tweak gave a little boost to frame rate.
title: GOD EATER 3

notes: As of this latest proton update, still stuck at an infinite loading screen.
title: GOD EATER 3

notes:
Performance is noticeably improved over 4.2-9; dips are still present but the overall framerate is considerably better. Unfortunately, as with previous versions, it is still not possible to enter a mission due to an infinite loading screen.

Further, this version introduces a new bug: Steam managed controllers (or Switch Pro, at least) do not behave correctly. Random inputs are fed to the game (although curiously no inputs are received during the opening FMV at all) if the controller is plugged in when the game starts. If the controller is plugged in later (but Steam configuration is still reported as successfully loaded) the game will fail to receive inputs. As such, it is no longer possible to use a controller that is not natively supported.
title: GOD EATER 3

notes:
None of the below input problems. FPS is fine, but maybe that's just because of high enough specs. 

All versions of proton currently have infinite load time. This game does not use Denuvo like the previous God Eater games, so that's not the problem.
title: GOD EATER 3

notes:
PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command% fixes all my FPS issues and the game runs completely fine.
But sadly when going on missions the game gets stuck in a never-ending loading screen. Real shame!
title: GOD EATER 3
